---
title: "07_PCA_isoprenoids"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
targets::tar_source(here::here("R/analysis_internship.R"))
targets::tar_source(here::here("R/plot_exploration_article1.R"))
targets::tar_load(imputed.traits)
targets::tar_load(DB_bvocs_iso_mono_EF)
targets::tar_load(tree)
targets::tar_load(woodiv_species)

#in the trait database there is no imputed values for liquidambar orientalis SLA and StemSpecDens

#Creation d'un indice qui renseigne sur le possibilité d'une espèce a brak le trade off iso/mono

data_traits_EF <-merge_trait_EF(imputed.traits, DB_bvocs_iso_mono_EF)  

```

Les valeurs de SLA sont en mm\^2.mg-1 et sembloe être dans les bons ordres de grandeurs pour les arbres

#PCA \## Mise en place des data set et PCA object in order to plot the trait space from the different subdata set to ubderstand the trade-offs between the different functional traits in the medit region

```{r}
#| include: false

data_traits_EF <- subset(data_traits_EF, select = -c(SeedMass, DispMode, Sum, total, p_isoprene, p_monoterpenes, prct_isoprene, prct_monoterpenes, isoprene_mod, binaire, BloomBreadth  )) 

#subset 101 sp pour les quelle son les isoprenoids + les taux en trait continus
data_traits_sp_iso_EF <- data_traits_EF|> dplyr::filter(BVOCsData == 1) |>subset( select = -c(BVOCsData, type)) |>  normaliser_dataframe() 


funspace::funspaceDim(data_traits_sp_iso_EF)## retain PC1 and 2
pca.trait_isoprenoids <- princomp(data_traits_sp_iso_EF, cor=TRUE)
summary(pca.trait_isoprenoids)

```

```{r}

#| echo: false
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))
# 6. PCA avec les isoprénoïdes
trait_space_iso <-funspace::funspace(pca.trait_isoprenoids, PCs = c(1,2) )


## Ajouter des noms d'espèces
species_coords <- trait_space_iso$originalX$scores 
noms_a_afficher <- c( "Quercus_crenata", "Ulmus_glabra", "Tamarix_africana", "Frangula_alnus", "Abies_alba")


plot(trait_space_iso, quant.plot = TRUE, arrows = TRUE, arrows.length = 0.9)

# Extraire les coordonnées des espèces à afficher
coords_a_afficher <- species_coords[rownames(species_coords) %in% noms_a_afficher, c("Comp.1", "Comp.2")]

# Tracer les points précis pour chaque espèce
points(coords_a_afficher[, "Comp.1"], coords_a_afficher[, "Comp.2"],
       pch = 19, col = "blue", cex = 1.2)

# Appliquer un jitter global aux coordonnées des étiquettes
coords_jittered <- jitter(as.matrix(coords_a_afficher), amount = 0.02)

# Ajouter les étiquettes avec le jitter global
text(coords_jittered[, 1], coords_jittered[, 2],
     labels = rownames(coords_jittered),
     cex = 0.8, col = "black", pos = 3)





```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggrepel)
library(tibble)

# --- 1. Trait space
trait_space_iso <- funspace::funspace(pca.trait_isoprenoids, PCs = c(1,2))

# --- 2. Extract quantile grid (this is what you actually have)
TPD <- trait_space_iso$global$images$TPD.quantiles |>
  reshape2::melt() |>
  rename(PC1 = Var1, PC2 = Var2)

# Remove NA (important!)
TPD <- TPD |> filter(!is.na(value))

# --- 3. Contour levels (same logic as your working code)
contour_levels <- quantile(TPD$value,
                           probs = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.99),
                           na.rm = TRUE)

# --- 4. Species
species_coords <- as.data.frame(trait_space_iso$originalX$scores) |>
  rownames_to_column("species")

noms_a_afficher <- c("Quercus_crenata", "Ulmus_glabra",
                     "Tamarix_africana", "Frangula_alnus", "Abies_alba")

species_sel <- species_coords |>
  filter(species %in% noms_a_afficher)

# --- 5. Arrows
arrows <- as.data.frame(trait_space_iso$PCAInfo$fit$arrows) |>
  rownames_to_column("variable")

arrow_scale <- 0.9
arrows <- arrows |>
  mutate(Comp.1 = Comp.1 * arrow_scale,
         Comp.2 = Comp.2 * arrow_scale)


# --- 7. Plot
p <- ggplot() +

  # --- Quantile surface (NO interpolation)
  geom_raster(data = TPD,
              aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = value),
              alpha = 0.35) +

  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("red", "orange", "yellow", "white"),
    values = scales::rescale(c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.99)),
    name = "Quantile space",
    na.value = "white"
  ) +

  # --- Contours
  geom_contour(data = TPD,
               aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, z = value),
               breaks = contour_levels,
               color = "black",
               linewidth = 0.4,
               alpha = 0.6) +

  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +

  # --- Background species
  geom_point(data = species_coords,
             aes(x = Comp.1, y = Comp.2),
             color = "grey80",
             size = 1) +

  # --- Selected species
  geom_point(data = species_sel,
             aes(x = Comp.1, y = Comp.2),
             shape = 21,
             fill = "blue",
             color = "black",
             size = 3) +

  geom_text_repel(data = species_sel,
                  aes(x = Comp.1, y = Comp.2, label = species),
                  size = 4,
                  box.padding = 0.4) +

  # --- Arrows
  geom_segment(data = arrows,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = Comp.1, yend = Comp.2),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm")),
               color = "black") +

  geom_text_repel(data = arrows,
                  aes(x = Comp.1, y = Comp.2, label = variable),
                  size = 4) +

  # --- Axes
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +

  coord_equal() +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )

print(p)
```

```{r}
scores <- trait_space_iso$originalX$scores[, c("Comp.1", "Comp.2")]
library(ks)

kde_res <- kde(x = scores)
TPD <- expand.grid(
  PC1 = kde_res$eval.points[[1]],
  PC2 = kde_res$eval.points[[2]]
)

TPD$z <- as.vector(kde_res$estimate)

TPD <- TPD |>
  arrange(desc(z)) |>
  mutate(cumprob = cumsum(z) / sum(z))
levels <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.99)


ggplot(TPD, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2)) +

  geom_raster(aes(fill = z), alpha = 0.3) +

  geom_contour(aes(z = cumprob),
               breaks = levels,
               color = "black",
               linewidth = 0.6) +

  coord_equal() +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggrepel)
library(tibble)
library(ggnewscale)
library(ks)  # for kernel density

# --- 1. Trait space (assuming pca.trait_isoprenoids is already computed)
trait_space_iso <- funspace::funspace(pca.trait_isoprenoids, PCs = c(1,2))

# --- 2. Compute kernel density (matching funspace)
scores <- trait_space_iso$originalX$scores[, c("Comp.1", "Comp.2")]
kde_res <- ks::kde(x = scores)

TPD <- expand.grid(
  PC1 = kde_res$eval.points[[1]],
  PC2 = kde_res$eval.points[[2]]
)
TPD$z <- as.vector(kde_res$estimate)

# --- 3. Cumulative probability for contours
TPD <- TPD |>
  arrange(desc(z)) |>
  mutate(cumprob = cumsum(z) / sum(z))

# --- 4. Probability levels (as in funspace)
prob_levels <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.99)

# --- 5. Species coordinates
species_coords <- as.data.frame(trait_space_iso$originalX$scores) |>
  rownames_to_column("species")

noms_a_afficher <- c("Quercus_crenata",
                     "Tamarix_africana", "Frangula_alnus", "Abies_alba")

species_sel <- species_coords |>
  filter(species %in% noms_a_afficher) |>
  mutate(species_label = gsub("_", " ", species))  # Replace underscore with space

# --- 6. Arrows (PCA loadings)
arrows <- as.data.frame(trait_space_iso$PCAInfo$fit$arrows) |>
  rownames_to_column("variable")

arrow_scale <- 1.0
arrows <- arrows |>
  mutate(Comp.1 = Comp.1 * arrow_scale,
         Comp.2 = Comp.2 * arrow_scale)

# --- 7. Prepare manual label positions for arrow labels
# Start with tip coordinates
arrow_labels <- arrows %>%
  select(variable, tip_x = Comp.1, tip_y = Comp.2)

# Override positions for variables that need fine‑tuning
manual_labels <- arrow_labels %>%
  mutate(
    label_x = tip_x,
    label_y = tip_y,
    # Adjust X positions
    label_x = case_when(
      variable == "LeafArea"     ~ tip_x - 0.9,
      variable == "StemSpecDens" ~ tip_x + 0.3,
      variable == "isoprene"     ~ tip_x - 0.1,
      variable == "SLA"          ~ tip_x - 0.1,
      TRUE                       ~ tip_x
    ),
    # Adjust Y positions
    label_y = case_when(
      variable == "LeafArea"     ~ tip_y + 0.3,
      variable == "isoprene"     ~ tip_y - 0.4,
      variable == "StemSpecDens" ~ tip_y - 0.4,
      variable == "HeightMax"    ~ tip_y + 0.3,
      variable == "monoterpenes" ~ tip_y + 0.3,
      variable == "SLA"          ~ tip_y + 0.3,
      TRUE                       ~ tip_y
    )
  )

# --- 8. Determine expanded plot limits to avoid clipping
x_range <- range(c(species_coords$Comp.1, arrows$Comp.1))
y_range <- range(c(species_coords$Comp.2, arrows$Comp.2))

x_pad <- diff(x_range) * 0.2   # 20% extra space on each side
y_pad <- diff(y_range) * 0.2

x_lim <- c(x_range[1] - x_pad, x_range[2] + x_pad)
y_lim <- c(y_range[1] - y_pad, y_range[2] + y_pad)

# --- 9. Build the final plot
set.seed(123)
p <- ggplot() +

  # Density raster
  geom_raster(data = TPD,
              aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, fill = z),
              alpha = 0.5) +

  # Gradient: high density = red, low density = white
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("white", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
    name = "Density"
  ) +

  # Probability contours
  geom_contour(data = TPD,
               aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, z = cumprob),
               breaks = prob_levels,
               color = "grey80",
               linewidth = 1.5) +

  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +

  # Background species
  geom_point(data = species_coords,
             aes(x = Comp.1, y = Comp.2),
             colour = "grey60", size = 5) +

  # Selected species
  geom_point(data = species_sel,
             aes(x = Comp.1, y = Comp.2),
             shape = 21, fill = "#75b047", colour = "#0b4417", size = 10) +

  # Species labels: formatted with spaces and italics
  geom_text_repel(data = species_sel,
                  aes(x = Comp.1, y = Comp.2, label = species_label),
                  fontface = "italic",
                  size = 12, box.padding = 0.8,
                  max.overlaps = 20) +

  # Arrows
  geom_segment(data = arrows,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = Comp.1, yend = Comp.2),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.5, "cm")),
               colour = "grey30") +

  # Arrow labels – using geom_text with manual positions
  geom_text(data = manual_labels,
            aes(x = label_x, y = label_y, label = variable),
            size = 15) +

  # Axes
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +

  coord_equal() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = x_lim) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = y_lim) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
  )

# Display the plot
print(p)


ggsave("trait_space_plot.png", plot = p, width = 40, height = 40 * (diff(y_lim)/diff(x_lim)), dpi = 300, units = "cm")

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggrepel)
library(tibble)
library(ggnewscale)
library(ks)  # for kernel density

# --- 1. Trait space (assuming pca.trait_isoprenoids is already computed)
trait_space_iso <- funspace::funspace(pca.trait_isoprenoids, PCs = c(1,3))

# --- 2. Compute kernel density (matching funspace)
scores <- trait_space_iso$originalX$scores[, c("Comp.1", "Comp.3")]
kde_res <- ks::kde(x = scores)

TPD <- expand.grid(
  PC1 = kde_res$eval.points[[1]],
  PC3 = kde_res$eval.points[[2]]
)
TPD$z <- as.vector(kde_res$estimate)

# --- 3. Cumulative probability for contours
TPD <- TPD |>
  arrange(desc(z)) |>
  mutate(cumprob = cumsum(z) / sum(z))

# --- 4. Probability levels (as in funspace)
prob_levels <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.99)

# --- 5. Species coordinates
species_coords <- as.data.frame(trait_space_iso$originalX$scores) |>
  rownames_to_column("species")

noms_a_afficher <- c("Quercus_crenata",
                     "Tamarix_africana", "Frangula_alnus", "Abies_alba")

species_sel <- species_coords |>
  filter(species %in% noms_a_afficher) |>
  mutate(species_label = gsub("_", " ", species))  # Replace underscore with space

# --- 6. Arrows (PCA loadings)
arrows <- as.data.frame(trait_space_iso$PCAInfo$fit$arrows) |>
  rownames_to_column("variable")

arrow_scale <- 1.0
arrows <- arrows |>
  mutate(Comp.1 = Comp.1 * arrow_scale,
         Comp.3 = Comp.3 * arrow_scale)

# --- 7. Prepare manual label positions for arrow labels
# Start with tip coordinates
arrow_labels <- arrows %>%
  select(variable, tip_x = Comp.1, tip_y = Comp.3)

# Override positions for variables that need fine‑tuning
manual_labels <- arrow_labels %>%
  mutate(
    label_x = tip_x,
    label_y = tip_y,
    # Adjust X positions
    label_x = case_when(
      variable == "LeafArea"     ~ tip_x - 0.9,
      variable == "StemSpecDens" ~ tip_x + 0.3,
      variable == "isoprene"     ~ tip_x - 0.1,
      variable == "SLA"          ~ tip_x - 0.1,
      TRUE                       ~ tip_x
    ),
    # Adjust Y positions
    label_y = case_when(
      variable == "LeafArea"     ~ tip_y + 0.3,
      variable == "isoprene"     ~ tip_y - 0.4,
      variable == "StemSpecDens" ~ tip_y - 0.4,
      variable == "HeightMax"    ~ tip_y + 0.3,
      variable == "monoterpenes" ~ tip_y + 0.3,
      variable == "SLA"          ~ tip_y + 0.3,
      TRUE                       ~ tip_y
    )
  )

# --- 8. Determine expanded plot limits to avoid clipping
x_range <- range(c(species_coords$Comp.1, arrows$Comp.1))
y_range <- range(c(species_coords$Comp.3, arrows$Comp.3))

x_pad <- diff(x_range) * 0.2   # 20% extra space on each side
y_pad <- diff(y_range) * 0.2

x_lim <- c(x_range[1] - x_pad, x_range[2] + x_pad)
y_lim <- c(y_range[1] - y_pad, y_range[2] + y_pad)

# --- 9. Build the final plot
set.seed(123)
p <- ggplot() +

  # Density raster
  geom_raster(data = TPD,
              aes(x = PC1, y = PC3, fill = z),
              alpha = 0.5) +

  # Gradient: high density = red, low density = white
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("white", "yellow", "orange", "red"),
    name = "Density"
  ) +

  # Probability contours
  geom_contour(data = TPD,
               aes(x = PC1, y = PC3, z = cumprob),
               breaks = prob_levels,
               color = "grey80",
               linewidth = 1.5) +

  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +

  # Background species
  geom_point(data = species_coords,
             aes(x = Comp.1, y = Comp.3),
             colour = "grey60", size = 5) +

  # Selected species
  geom_point(data = species_sel,
             aes(x = Comp.1, y = Comp.3),
             shape = 21, fill = "#75b047", colour = "#0b4417", size = 10) +

  # Species labels: formatted with spaces and italics
  geom_text_repel(data = species_sel,
                  aes(x = Comp.2, y = Comp.3, label = species_label),
                  fontface = "italic",
                  size = 12, box.padding = 0.8,
                  max.overlaps = 20) +

  # Arrows
  geom_segment(data = arrows,
               aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = Comp.1, yend = Comp.3),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.5, "cm")),
               colour = "grey30") +

  # Arrow labels – using geom_text with manual positions
  geom_text(data = manual_labels,
            aes(x = label_x, y = label_y, label = variable),
            size = 15) +

  # Axes
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +

  coord_equal() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = x_lim) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = y_lim) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
  )

# Display the plot
print(p)


ggsave("trait_space_plot2.png", plot = p, width = 40, height = 40 * (diff(y_lim)/diff(x_lim)), dpi = 300, units = "cm")

```
